narrative: AI Engineer with six years of experience at Mad Street Den, a product‑first AI startup. Strong verified skill depth in search‑related models and deep‑learning frameworks pushes the ranking. Demonstrates solid JD alignment through hands‑on work with BM25 ranking, QLoRA fine‑tuning, and extensive use of TensorFlow, PyTorch and scikit‑learn for retrieval pipelines. Also shows breadth of technical skills across both classic and modern ML stacks.
